title: petrosaviaceae
intro: The Petrosaviaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a group of relatively small, herbaceous plants, typically found in subtropical and tropical regions. This family is characterized by its unique combination of primitive and advanced characteristics, and is often considered one of the most ancient lineages of flowering plants. The Petrosaviaceae family is comprised of two closely related genera, Petrosavia and Sapria.
